name: hcportal_getEvents
description: Retrieves hash running events filtered by geographic constraints (kennels, cities, regions, countries, continents) for display in the admin portal or on public HashRuns.org pages. Returns either a summary list or full event details depending on @fullDetails. Supports past/future/all time windows. @kennelUniqueShortName also falls back to city/region/country name matching. Dissemination rules are enforced for non-admin callers.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID used to look up the authenticated user and device secret. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token, validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: publicKennelIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of public kennel GUIDs. Parsed via STRING_SPLIT. At least one geographic constraint (any parameter below) is required.

parameters.name: kennelUniqueShortName
parameters.description: Single kennel unique short name. If not matched as a kennel, falls back to City, Region, or Country name lookup (most-events-in-last-30-days wins on tie).

parameters.name: specialEventKennelIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated public kennel GUIDs. Only events with EventGeographicScope >= 2 are included.

parameters.name: cityNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated city names. Matched case-insensitively with spaces stripped via TRIM(LOWER(REPLACE())).

parameters.name: specialEventCityNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated city names for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: regionNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated region names. Matched case-insensitively with spaces stripped.

parameters.name: regionCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated region abbreviation codes. Matched case-insensitively.

parameters.name: cityIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated city GUIDs. Parsed via STRING_SPLIT.

parameters.name: regionIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated region GUIDs. Parsed via STRING_SPLIT.

parameters.name: countryIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated country GUIDs. Parsed via STRING_SPLIT.

parameters.name: specialEventRegionNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated region names for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: specialEventRegionCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated region codes for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: countryCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated country codes (e.g. 'NL', 'BE'). Matched case-insensitively.

parameters.name: countryNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated country names. Matched case-insensitively with spaces stripped.

parameters.name: specialEventCountryCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated country codes for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: specialEventCountryNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated country names for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: continentNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated continent names. Matched case-insensitively with spaces stripped.

parameters.name: continentCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated continent codes (e.g. 'EU', 'AS', 'NA'). Matched case-insensitively.

parameters.name: specialEventContinentNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated continent names for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: specialEventContinentCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated continent codes for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: fullDetails
parameters.description: Controls output shape: NULL or 0 returns EventSummaryList (fewer columns), 1 returns EventFullDetails (all columns including FB integration fields and pricing).

parameters.name: weeksToDisplay
parameters.description: Number of weeks before/after today to include. Defaults to 52. NULL is normalized to 999 (effectively all time). Capped at 999.

parameters.name: pastOrFuture
parameters.description: Time window direction: 'future' (default, from -1 day to +weeksToDisplay), 'past' (-weeksToDisplay to +1 day), 'all' (-weeksToDisplay to +weeksToDisplay). NULL defaults to 'future'.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: EventSummaryList
rowsets.description: Returned when @fullDetails IS NULL or 0. One row per event matching filters. Filtered by removed=0, IsVisible=1, date window, geographic constraints, and dissemination rules.

columns.name: syncLat
columns.description: Computed latitude: uses FbLatitude if UseFbLatLon=1 and valid non-zero; else COALESCE(Event.Latitude, Kennel.Latitude, City.Latitude) if non-zero; else City.Latitude

columns.name: syncLong
columns.description: Computed longitude: same fallback logic as syncLat

columns.name: eventStartDatetime
columns.description: FbEventStartDatetime if UseFbRunDetails=1, else EventStartDatetime. Converted to DATETIME2 (local time; DATETIMEOFFSET migration is a known TODO).

columns.name: daysUntilEvent
columns.description: DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), eventStartDatetime). Negative for past events.

columns.name: searchText
columns.description: Concatenated search string wrapped in '~ ... ~'. Includes: event name, kennel names/tags, hares, all location fields, event number, city/region/country names/codes/search tags, geographic scope keywords, continent name. Used for client-side text search.

columns.name: eventCityAndCountry
columns.description: Formatted 'City[, Region], Country' string. Uses FB location fields if UseFbLocation=1 and they have content (LEN >= 3), else HC fields; falls back to City/Region/Country table data. Region included if Country.ShowRegion=1.

columns.name: eventImage
columns.description: FbEventImage if UseFbImage=1, else EventImage. Added in v1.1.0 to support image display in the run list.

columns.name: useFbImage
columns.description: Event.UseFbImage — 1 if the FB image should be used, else 0.

columns.name: eventChatMessageCount
columns.description: Unread chat message count for this event and the requesting user. Computed as total non-removed EventMessages minus the user's LastSequenceCount from HC.EventMessageBadgeCounts. 0 if no messages or no read cursor exists.

rowsets.name: EventFullDetails
rowsets.description: Returned when @fullDetails = 1. One row per event. Same filters as EventSummaryList. Includes all summary columns plus pricing, payment, Facebook integration overrides, dissemination flags, and raw HC/FB location variants.

columns.name: eventStartDatetime
columns.description: FbEventStartDatetime if UseFbRunDetails=1, else EventStartDatetime. Converted to DATETIME2 (local time; DATETIMEOFFSET migration is a known TODO).

columns.name: eventDescription
columns.description: COALESCE(FbEventDescription if UseFbRunDetails=1, else EventDescription, '') — never NULL

columns.name: narrowEventLatitude
columns.description: Computed latitude: FB (if UseFbLatLon=1 and valid non-zero) > Event > Kennel > City

columns.name: narrowEventLongitude
columns.description: Computed longitude: same fallback as narrowEventLatitude

columns.name: daysUntilEvent
columns.description: DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), eventStartDatetime). Negative for past events.

columns.name: searchText
columns.description: Concatenated search string wrapped in '~ ... ~'. Same composition as EventSummaryList.searchText.

columns.name: eventChatMessageCount
columns.description: Unread chat message count for this event and the requesting user. Same computation as EventSummaryList.eventChatMessageCount.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning (e.g. @weeksToDisplay NULL normalised to 999)
Never change the eventGeographicScope integer codes (1-7) without updating client logic
Never remove support for the two magic service account GUIDs (11111111-..., 22222222-...) without coordinating frontend changes
